properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have seen the many faces of fear and of pain I have watched the tears fall plenty from heartache and strain So if life's journey has you weary and afraid There's rest in the shadow of His wings

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have walked through the valleys, the mountains, and plains I have held the hand of freedom that washes all my stains If you feel weight of many trials and burdens from this world There's freedom in the shelter of the Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I have seen the healing hand of God Reaching out and mending broken hearts Taste and see the fullness of His peace And hold on to what's being held out The healing hand of God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I have touched the scars upon His hands to see if they were real He has walked the road before me, He knows just how I feel When you feel that there's not anyone, who understands your pain, Just remember all of Jesus suffering.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause I have seen the healing hand of God Reaching out and mending broken hearts Taste and see the fullness of His peace And hold on to what's being held out Cast all your cares on Him for He cares for you He's near to the broken and confused By His stripes our spirit is renewed, So enter in the joy prepared for you.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I have seen the healing hand of God Reaching out and mending broken hearts Taste and see the fullness of His peace And hold on to what's being held out The healing hand of God, The healing hand of God, The healing hand of God, And hold on to what's being held out (hold on) And hold on to what's being held out (hold on) The healing hand of God, oh, oh.
